leadText: The Plasma Card (Japanese: プラズマカード Plasma Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Plasma Card is one of the things the player needs to access restricted areas of the Plasma Frigate .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card key needed to enter the password inside the Plasma Frigate.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Plasma Card is one of the things the player needs to access restricted areas of the Plasma Frigate . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card key needed to enter the password inside the Plasma Frigate. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method B2 Plasma Frigate B2F (from the Team Plasma Grunt with a Trubbish and Zangoose after defeating her) W2 Plasma Frigate B1F (from the Team Plasma Grunt with three Pawniard after defeating her)
